pages.text: Small Bird was a small bird. He was very small and very birdy.

blocks.text: Small Bird was a small bird. He was very small and very birdy.

pages.text: Small Bird lived in a beautiful house with the Giant. Small Bird loved the Giant very much. She was a kind Giant. She gave Small Bird lots of toys.

blocks.text: Small Bird lived in a beautiful house with the Giant. Small Bird loved the Giant very much.
She was a kind Giant. She gave Small Bird lots of toys.

pages.text: Small Bird was sad when the Giant wasn’t around. So one day Small Bird went to go find the Giant.

blocks.text: Small Bird was sad when the Giant wasn’t around.
So one day Small Bird went to go find the Giant.

pages.text: Small Bird flew up and up until he could see the whole world. He wanted to find the Giant. Where would he land?

blocks.text: Small Bird flew up and up until he could see the whole world.
He wanted to find the Giant. Where would he land?

pages.text: Small Bird landed in a huge forest, filled with trees and flowers and treasure. Small Bird loved playing with the shiny jewels! But where was the Giant?

blocks.text: Small Bird landed in a huge forest, filled with trees and flowers and treasure.
Small Bird loved playing with the shiny jewels! But where was the Giant?

pages.text: Small Bird walked into a vast field of snow. The snow was white and soft. Small Bird loved rolling around on the cool ground. But where was the Giant?

blocks.text: Small Bird walked into a vast field of snow. The snow was white and soft.
Small Bird loved rolling around on the cool ground. But where was the Giant?

pages.text: This time, Small Bird flew even higher into the sky. He flew among the stars and galaxies! He saw the moon! He saw a comet! But where was the Giant?

blocks.text: This time, Small Bird flew even higher into the sky.
He flew among the stars and galaxies! He saw the moon! He saw a comet!
But where was the Giant?

pages.text: From way up high, with his sharp birdy eyes, Small Bird saw something! What could it be?

blocks.text: From way up high, with his sharp birdy eyes, Small Bird saw something!
What could it be?

pages.text: Small Bird dived down, down, down. Where would he land?

blocks.text: Small Bird dived down, down, down.
Where would he land?

pages.text: Small Bird landed right in the Giant’s hands! He was so happy to see her. “I love you, Giant!” he shrieked.

blocks.text: Small Bird landed right in the Giant’s hands! He was so happy to see her.
“I love you, Giant!” he shrieked.

pages.text: The Giant held Small Bird close to her. “I love you too,” the Giant said.

blocks.text: The Giant held Small Bird close to her.
“I love you too,” the Giant said.
